mapper.sql: select id, inspected_unit_id, inspected_unit, inspection_type, unit_check_id, unit_check, inspection_time, inspection_site, score, rectification_time, current_state, question, create_time, create_user_id, create_user, update_time, charge_people_id, charge_people, corrective_action, picture_proof, document_proof,caozuo_type,reason_return,parent_id,paixu_value,wenjianname from bdgl_regular
mapper.insert:
insert into bdgl_regular
id, inspected_unit_id, inspected_unit, inspection_type, unit_check_id, unit_check, inspection_time, inspection_site, score, rectification_time, current_state, question, create_time, create_user_id, create_user, update_time, charge_people_id, charge_people, corrective_action, picture_proof, document_proof, caozuo_type , reason_return , parent_id , paixu_value , wenjianname ,
#{id}, #{inspectedUnitId}, #{inspectedUnit}, #{inspectionType}, #{unitCheckId}, #{unitCheck}, #{inspectionTime}, #{inspectionSite}, #{score}, #{rectificationTime}, #{currentState}, #{question}, #{createTime}, #{createUserId}, #{createUser}, #{updateTime}, #{chargePeopleId}, #{chargePeople}, #{correctiveAction}, #{pictureProof}, #{documentProof}, #{caoZuoType}, #{reasonReturn}, #{parentId}, #{paixuValue}, #{wenjianname},
mapper.select: WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM bdgl_regular where inspected_unit_id = #{deptId} or parent_id = #{deptId}) and YEAR(inspection_time) = YEAR(NOW())
where (inspected_unit_id = #{deptId} or parent_id = #{deptId}) and caozuo_type='0' and YEAR(inspection_time) = YEAR(NOW())
mapper.delete:
delete from bdgl_regular where id in
#{id}
